mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_rooms ( room_id, user_id, status, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{roomId}, #{userId}, COALESCE(#{status}, 'ACTIVE'), NOW(), NOW() ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE user_id = COALESCE(VALUES(user_id), user_id), status = 'ACTIVE', updated_at = NOW()
mapper.update: UPDATE chat_rooms SET last_message = #{lastMessage}, unread_count = unread_count + CASE WHEN #{increaseUnread} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, updated_at = NOW(), status = 'ACTIVE' WHERE room_id = #{roomId}
UPDATE chat_rooms SET status = 'CLOSED', updated_at = NOW() WHERE room_id = #{roomId}
mapper.select: SELECT cr.room_id, cr.user_id, u.display_name AS user_name, cr.last_message, cr.unread_count, DATE_FORMAT(cr.updated_at, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s') AS updated_at, cr.status FROM chat_rooms cr JOIN users u ON u.user_id = cr.user_id ORDER BY cr.updated_at DESC

SELECT cr.room_id, cr.user_id, u.display_name AS user_name, cr.last_message, cr.unread_count, DATE_FORMAT(cr.updated_at, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s') AS updated_at, cr.status FROM chat_rooms cr JOIN users u ON u.user_id = cr.user_id WHERE cr.room_id = #{roomId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_messages ( room_id, sender_id, sender, role, type, content, created_at ) VALUES ( #{roomId}, #{senderId}, #{sender}, #{role}, #{type}, #{content}, #{timestamp} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, room_id, sender_id, sender, role, type, content, created_at FROM chat_messages WHERE room_id = #{roomId} ORDER BY created_at ASC, id ASC
